Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperial Guard]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Guard wears red-and-black pressed uniforms marked with a crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Guard's crest is a golden shield marked with the Imperial Seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Imperial Palace's resources were used for keeping the Capital running and funding the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Guard helped restore order to the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Imperial Guards can be requisitioned by any prison in the Capital during an emergency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Imperial Guard is a group led by Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Head of the Imperial Guard is Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Imperial Guard will fall apart without an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Guard is a group of people in red-and-black uniforms and mismatched body parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Guard called for the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperial Guard invaded The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Imperial Guard has stories of traitors and rebels.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Guard is a group that Fletcher considers too valuable to bother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Guard works with the troops to restore order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Ayana's parents were members of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — An Imperial Guard has muscular reptilian replacements for arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Imperial Guard searched for the Emperor after his chambers were attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Imperial Guard crest is the Aurelian Shield.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Guard is attacking the location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Guard is required for Bliss to enter the palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — An Imperial Guard with orange cat eyes salutes Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Imperial Guard is part of the Imperialist alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Imperial Guard escorted Calder through the halls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — A goat-legged Imperial Guard was in the building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Imperial Guard includes a blond captain.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Imperial Guard is a group Shera could be carried away by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — The Imperial Guard are guards for the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Guard is a group that Lucan suggests alerting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — One of the assassins has Imperial Guard blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Imperial Guard secures the borders of the Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — An Imperial Guard with orange eyes was running away and shouting orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Imperial Guard members have body parts replaced with Kameira equivalents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Imperial Guard is composed of men and women in uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Jyrine's clothes resembled a secondhand Imperial Guard uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — An Imperial Guard with wide owl's eyes was among the crowd of humans behind the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Lucan salutes like the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Heads of the Imperial Guard signed a letter of personal regret.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Jarelys Teach is of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Head of the Imperial Guard is a high-status combatant.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperial Guard has enhanced senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — One Imperial Guard has tusks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — One Imperial Guard has scaled arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Guards are accompanying Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Guard wears red-and-black uniforms and utilizes Kameira enhancements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Imperial Guard guard the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Guard includes members with fox ears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Guard is gathered outside the main door of the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The average Imperial Guard is significantly larger than Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Imperial Guard includes doctors who are used to dealing with patients with unusual biology.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Imperial Guard is stationed outside the Emperor’s chambers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Imperial Guard has a specific uniform that impresses people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Calder bets on the Champions and the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Most of the troops defending The Testament are part of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Imperial Guard is a military force in the Capital.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Imperial Guard performs open security for the Imperialist side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Imperial Guard patrols can be overwhelmed by packs of scavengers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Guard secures the tunnels of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperial Guard are numerous and spread everywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — A team of Magisters and Imperial Guards awaited Shera on the wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The Imperial Guard conducts inspections.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — A group of Trip's friends from the Imperial Guard spotted him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The Imperial Guard uniform is worn by thousands of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Imperial Guard is the group from which Ayana inherited Kameira blood.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
